Title: Verify navigation to settings page from homepage
Preconditions: App is launched; user is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the homepage.
2. User clicks **"impostazioni"** (settings).

Title: Verify default display of new location on homepage
Preconditions: App is launched; user is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the homepage.
2. User **does not click** "impostazioni" (settings).
Expected Result: A new location is displayed on the homepage.

Title: Verify navigation to detailed location page from homepage
Preconditions: A new location is displayed on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the homepage with a new location displayed.
2. User clicks on the displayed location.
Expected Result: The detailed location page opens successfully.

Title: Verify navigation to Pathfinder from homepage
Preconditions: A new location is displayed on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the homepage with a new location displayed.
2. User clicks **"Pathfinder"**.

Title: Verify swipe-up action from homepage
Preconditions: A new location is displayed on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the homepage with a new location displayed.
2. User performs a **swipe-up** gesture.
Expected Result: The app handles the swipe-up gracefully (e.g., no crash, no unexpected behavior).

Title: Verify opening system map from detailed location page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed location page.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the detailed location page.
2. User clicks **"Navigate"** (or equivalent "Apertura mappa di sistema").
Expected Result: The system map opens with the location highlighted.

Title: Verify opening Yelp in browser from detailed location page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed location page.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the detailed location page.
2. User clicks **"Open in Browser"** (or equivalent "Apertura sito Yelp sul browser").
Expected Result: Yelp website opens in the browser with the location’s page loaded.

Title: Verify calling business from Yelp browser page
Test Steps:
1. User is on the Yelp browser page.
2. User clicks **"Call Business"** (or equivalent "Avvio chiamata al business").
Expected Result: The call screen opens with the business number pre-filled.

Title: Verify returning to homepage from Yelp browser page
Test Steps:
1. User is on the Yelp browser page.
2. User clicks **"Indietro"** (back).
Expected Result: The user is returned to the homepage.

Title: Verify returning to homepage after calling business
Preconditions: Call screen is open after clicking "Call Business".
Test Steps:
1. User cancels the call (or hangs up).
2. User clicks **"Indietro"** (back).
Expected Result: The user is returned to the homepage.

Title: Verify modifying preferences from homepage after returning from detailed page
Preconditions: User is on the homepage after returning from the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the homepage.
2. User clicks **"Like"** or **"Dislike"** on a location.
Expected Result: The preferences are updated, and the system confirms the action (e.g., visual feedback).

Title: Verify returning to homepage from Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the Pathfinder page.
2. User clicks **"Indietro"** (back).
Expected Result: The user is returned to the homepage.

Title: Verify displaying a question after entering Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the Pathfinder page.
2. User **does not click "Indietro"** (back).
Expected Result: A question is displayed for the user to answer.

Title: Verify displaying a suggested location after answering a question
Preconditions: A question is displayed on the Pathfinder page.
Test Data: A valid answer (e.g., "Yes" or "No" based on the question).
Test Steps:
1. User answers the question.
2. System determines a suggestion is available.

Title: Verify handling of no suggestion available after answering a question
Preconditions: A question is displayed on the Pathfinder page.
Test Data: An answer that results in no suggestion (e.g., invalid or edge-case input).
Test Steps:
1. User answers the question.
2. System determines no suggestion is available.
Expected Result: A message is displayed indicating no suggestion is available (e.g., "No locations match your criteria").

Title: Verify behavior when clicking "Navigate" and "Open in Browser" simultaneously (if applicable)
Preconditions: User is on the detailed location page.
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to click both **"Navigate"** and **"Open in Browser"** simultaneously (or in rapid succession).
Expected Result: The system handles the input gracefully (e.g., ignores the second click, shows an error, or prioritizes the last click).

Title: Verify behavior when no network connection is available for Yelp or map opening
Preconditions: User is on the detailed location page; device has no internet connection.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed (e.g., "No internet connection. Please check your settings.").

Title: Verify behavior when Pathfinder question has no valid answers
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page; question has no valid answers.
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to answer the question with invalid input.
Expected Result: The system prompts the user to select a valid answer or displays an error message.
